
```{r}
# restart R completely

.rs.restartR()
```

```{r}
devtools::document()
remove.packages("brfssTools")
```

```{r}
# restart R completely
.rs.restartR()
```

```{r}
devtools::install_local("C:/My Documents/R Projects/brfssTools",
                        quick = TRUE, upgrade = "never")
```

```{r}
# restart R completely
.rs.restartR()
```

```{r}
library(brfssTools)
brfss_crosswalk_editor()
```
